triage_rows.direction: keep_the_existing_outer runtime-stack control-loop routing when the loop-signal change layer remains stable
reconfigure_outer runtime-stack control-loop routing immediately when runtime_stack_control_loop_signal_mode_change flips state
refresh_the_requested target when reopen_target_change or interrupt_required_change flips state

interpretation: This is the topmost change detector for the narrow runtime-stack control loop signal feed.
An outer controller can watch it to know when loop routing semantics changed without rereading the signal feed every cycle.
